title: Missile in Deadly Iranian School Strike Appears to Be U.S.-Made, Photos Taken by Iran Show
summary_full: Iranian state media posted mangled remnants it claims were from the Feb. 28 attack in Minab. An analysis shows they have the markings of a missile made by American manufacturers
summary_public: Iranian state media posted mangled remnants it claims were from the Feb. 28 attack in Minab. An analysis shows they have the markings of a missile made by American manufacturers
